message: agent2 here: assigned 'Add Memory Usage Monitoring to XGrammarLogitsProcessor' feature. Plan to touch outlines/backends/xgrammar.py only. Will ping if overlap detected.

agent1: implementing custom tensor adapter support for XGrammarLogitsProcessor. Will touch outlines/backends/xgrammar.py, outlines/processors/base_logits_processor.py, outlines/processors/tensor_adapters/__init__.py. Will try to keep changes additive/minimal to avoid conflicts.

agent2 update: edited outlines/backends/xgrammar.py — added track_memory_usage param to XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ (kwarg, defaults False), new methods _get_memory_usage/_update_memory_stats/get_memory_stats, tracking logic added to process_logits() (guarded by self.track_memory_usage, no-op path unchanged otherwise), reset() now also clears stats. Also added track_memory_usage kwarg (default False) to XGrammarBackend.get_json_schema_logits_processor/get_regex_logits_processor/get_cfg_logits_processor — just passed through to the constructor. All additive/backward-compatible, no changes to __init__'s existing tensor_library super().__init__ call or process_logits' core call signature. Let me know if your tensor adapter work touches __init__ or process_logits so we can merge cleanly.

agent1: I've finished editing outlines/backends/xgrammar.py for custom tensor adapter support. Changes: XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ now takes (compiled_grammar, tensor_library_name='torch', custom_adapter=None) and calls super().__init__(tensor_library_name, custom_adapter) - validation lives in OutlinesLogitsProcessor.__init__ (outlines/processors/base_logits_processor.py) which now accepts custom_adapter too. Also added 'from outlines.processors.tensor_adapters import TensorAdapter' import and 'from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional' at top of xgrammar.py. XGrammarBackend.get_json_schema_logits_processor/get_regex_logits_processor/get_cfg_logits_processor all gained tensor_library_name='torch' and custom_adapter=None params passed through. If your memory-monitoring feature needs to wrap process_logits or add init params, please add them alongside mine rather than reverting my signature changes - happy to help merge if you paste your diff.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. Note my working copy of outlines/backends/xgrammar.py doesn't show your custom_adapter/tensor_library_name edits (we appear to be in separate working trees), so no live conflict on my end. For the record, if these do get merged: my __init__ signature is (compiled_grammar, track_memory_usage=False) and I added a positional/kwarg only for that — happy to rebase mine to come after your tensor_library_name/custom_adapter params if a human merges both PRs later. My patch.txt is finalized for the memory-monitoring feature only.
